{{Infobox location
| name = Hightower
| introduced = Of Dawn and Darkness
}}

''See also: [[Hightower Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Hightower is a famous citadel and the primary headquarters for the [[Luminian Order]], situated just outside the borders of the [[Capital]]. Originally established as a sanctuary for those escaping attacks from [[Elders]], the site has developed a powerful [[aura]] of peace and wellness due to centuries of people seeking refuge there. The fortification is characterized by massive gray-white stone walls that stand fifty feet tall and are decorated with red banners featuring a white sun. The structure began as a cathedral composed of high arches, pointed peaks, and stained glass, from which a central tower rises. This prominent tower is topped with a massive glass orb held by bronze arms, which functions as a brilliant white lantern that illuminates the area like a second sun. Inside, the complex contains numerous towers that serve as an immense [[library]], with shelves of books stretching many stories high toward a cavernous ceiling.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Hightower]] is the location of the [[Luminian]] headquarters.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Hightower]] is the [[Luminian]] citadel located just outside the borders of the [[Capital]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Hightower]] was built as a sanctuary for refugees fleeing from an [[Elder]] attack.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8" />}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Hightower]] is a location with power that [[Calder]] seeks to amplify.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The central tower of [[Hightower]] has a huge white [[diamond]] at its top.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Hightower]] emits light that strikes [[Jorin]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21" />}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[gate]] of [[Hightower]] is three stories high.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c12">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A white beam blasts from [[Hightower]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
